span.p:
NOT HIRED
━━━━━━━━━━━━━
10% stake slashed
90% returned
Minor rep penalty

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HIRED + SUCCESS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
50% stake returned
+50% bonus reward
+15 reputation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HIRED + FAILS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━

-15 reputation
Possible tier demotion
